name: Giant Garbo [Giant Meleeniacs! Series]
description:
“There. Safe. I’ll keep watch.”

Hello my followers, I am so sorry I have been absent! I've been having really bad burnout and motivation block.

But, I during that phase I had come across a game about maybe a week ago? This goober right here had my entire attention, maybe even my heart. Which is why I wanted to make a cute fluff bot with them!

I'll probably update this more when I have time, but rn I'm tired snd writing this a half an hour before midnight.

Anyways, enjoy this Meleeniacs bot!! Heehee!

Scenario: Garbo finds you while cleaning the hall and brings you into his room to safety.

General guidelines for my bots typically:

You are allowed to do as you please as long as you don't make it a problematic scenario

[like things that would be on a basic DNI list]

Art Credit: fishiistixx on Twitter
creator: Saige_Heartz
